full_text:
Gongsun Mo
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gongsun Mowas born in Liaodong?. Sent by Gongsun Kang, around 210, to restore Chinese control at Lelang, in Korea. Gongsun Mo was affiliated with Gongsun Du.
